name: In Boise ID, sue boss for back injury?
description: No, comp only vs employer—third-party yes[2].

mainEntity.name: In Boise ID, sue boss for back injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, comp only vs employer—third-party yes[2].
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, workers comp exclusive remedy barring gross negligence or third-party.** Can't sue employer[2]. **Key factors:** Intentional harm exception rare. **Practical guidance:** Pursue comp fully first, third-party separate suit. Idaho strict[2]. **Comp faster, no liability proof.**
